title: Navalyal Heat Wave
lead: Navalyal is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.11. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Navalyal is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Critical Level warning issued. 
 The temperature anomaly is significantly higher than usual, with a Z-Score of +5.11, indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 16.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, showing the intense heat.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
